title: Context Overload
description: A context packing benchmark with many candidates where critical context must survive and low-value context should be dropped.
goal: Show quality-preserving token reduction through context selection.
expected_constraints: Report before/after context tokens and savings percentage.
notes: The total candidate context is intentionally much larger than the context budget.

tasks.title: Pack context
tasks.description: Choose the evidence needed for a benchmark proof report.

tasks.title: Summarize context proof
tasks.description: Explain what context was included and excluded.

context_candidates.content: Benchmarks test optimizer behavior and not AGI performance.
Quality threshold must be preserved before cost is minimized.
Benchmark decisions are saved to the same run history tables.
The router filters by capability, privacy, JSON support, tools, and quality.
The scheduler compares greedy and simulated annealing plans.
A very long chat log with repeated speculation and little benchmark signal.
Hype language that should not be included in an honest proof report.
Background already covered by more relevant context.
